Value: 209,Category: Cy; Value: 209","CreationDate":"2025-12-03","SUBJECT":"AGRICULTURE, WALES","CATEGORY":"AGRICULTURE, WALES,AMAETHYDDIAETH, CYMRU","SUMMARY":"These Regulations amend assimilated law and other legislation in relation to the Basic Payment Scheme (“BPS”) established under Regulation (EU) No1307/2013 (“the Direct Payments Regulation”). These Regulations give the Welsh Ministers the power to taper payments under the BPS from 1 January 2026 until the end of 2028 when the BPS will close. These Regulations are made by the Welsh Ministers under powers conferred by section 16(1) of the Agriculture (Wales) Act 2023.,Mae’r Rheoliadau hyn yn diwygio cyfraith a gymathwyd a deddfwriaeth arall mewn perthynas â Chynllun y Taliad Sylfaenol (“BPS”) a sefydlwyd o dan Reoliad (EU) Rhif 1307/2013 (“y Rheoliad Taliadau Uniongyrchol”). Mae’r Rheoliadau hyn yn rhoi’r pŵer i Weinidogion Cymru i dapro taliadau o dan BPS o 1 Ionawr 2026 tan ddiwedd 2028 pan fydd BPS yn cau. Gwneir y Rheoliadau hyn gan Weinidogion Cymru o dan bwerau a roddir gan adran 16(1) o Ddeddf Amaethyddiaeth (Cymru) 2023.","":""}
